landing.hero_subtitle: Real estate market, mega projects and macro data — for global investors looking at Turkey. Position before the news hits.
landing.fact_1_desc: Competitors stop at province/district. Tradia goes deeper — 62-neighbourhood heat map for Bursa, 39-district median for Istanbul.
landing.fact_2_desc: Ministry of Environment + Istanbul Municipality + sahibinden + Bursa Council + EKAP + Central Bank + Statistics Institute. A thesis confirmed by 3-4 parallel channels is locked in.
landing.fact_3_desc: Endeksa is paywalled. Tradia is free at point of use. Formula, bug reports, self-criticism — all public.
landing.fact_4_desc: Cross-Hat Sprint 7 thesis on Arnavutköy: STRONG_POSITIVE on 4/4 channels. Official Ministry confirmation came 2 months later — 272.61 hectares.
landing.fact_5_desc: A first in Turkish media. Measures a single analyst's consistency across video and written work, automatically.
landing.cta_box_desc: Tradia analysis for one Turkish city — neighbourhood heat map + mega project signal + price medians. PDF, delivered instantly.

newsletter.list_subtitle: Neighbourhood granularity. Multi-media audit. Mega-plan radar.

manifesto.title: Data quality > Data volume
manifesto.subtitle: Tradia is building a new standard for Turkey investment intelligence.
manifesto.principle_1: Endeksa stops at province/district. Tradia signals at neighbourhood level.
manifesto.principle_2: Bloomberg lets analysts speak. Tradia measures their consistency.
manifesto.principle_3: Being on-window during an event is not the same as interpreting it.
manifesto.principle_4: Tradia corrects itself. That is the methodological backbone.
manifesto.principle_5: Yesterday it did not exist in Turkish investment intelligence. Today it is unrivalled.
